name: Cam Cameron
subject: Fwd: 48 Hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beach for Congress |
body:
---
| |
---|---|---
| Peter, As one of Brandon’s top supporters, I wanted to be certain that you saw his email below. In less than 24 hours, we’ve managed to close our monthly fundraising shortage by 62%. [**Please help us close out August with a strong showing by making an immediate online donation of $100 or $50.**](https://brandonbeach.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdnety-udyuidthb-y/) Brandon has asked me to update him on where we stand shortly. And I want to be able to tell him that we’ve met our goal before tonight’s midnight deadline. [**A donation of even $25 will help our efforts and keep us as the strongest fundraiser in this race.**](https://brandonbeach.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdnety-udyuidthb-j/) Thanks, Cam \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Brandon Beach
Date: Thu, Aug 29, 2019
Subject: 48 Hours
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, With each day, the Democratic Party is moving further and further to the left. Their radical proposals would destroy our economy, socialize healthcare, and rack up more and more debt. If we are going to stop them, it is imperative that we take back the House of Representatives from Nancy Pelosi and "The Squad" that is driving their agenda. [**Please help us take back Georgia’s 6th Congressional District by making a donation before our end of month fundraising deadline in less than 48 hours.**](https://brandonbeach.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdnety-udyuidthb-t/) With your support last quarter, we outraised every single candidate in the GOP primary field. We can’t afford to lose any momentum now. But I just spoke to my campaign finance director, and she informed me that we are $7,438 short of our monthly goal. You helped us finish first in fundraising last quarter, so I know I can count on you to help us close the gap once again. **[Help us finish the month strong by making an immediate contribution of $250, $100, $50, or $25.](https://brandonbeach.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdnety-udyuidthb-i/)** Thanks for your help today! Sincerely, Brandon [Donate](https://brandonbeach.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdnety-udyuidthb-d/) P.S. – To #TakeBackTheSixth, we need to elect leaders who can win and get things done. I am the only person with the proven, conservative track record who can make that happen. [**Join our team today by making a donation of $25.**](https://brandonbeach.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdnety-udyuidthb-h/) |
| |

name: Ryan, Team Chabot
subject: Today’s Democrats have gone to a whole new extreme.
body:
Today’s Democrats have gone to a whole new extreme. Just when we thought they couldn’t get further to the left, today’s Democrats are now calling for widespread socialism, universal healthcare, the Green New Deal, slavery reparations, open borders, and even infanticide.

No Images? Click here https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdclyit-kujkulhluu-a/

Friend,

Today’s Democrats have gone to a whole new extreme.

Just when we thought they couldn’t get further to the left, today’s Democrats are now calling for widespread socialism, universal healthcare, the Green New Deal, slavery reparations, open borders, and even infanticide.

While today’s Democrats give us much to worry about, we can rest easy knowing that our Congressman Steve Chabot is in Washington fighting tooth-and-nail against their radical agenda.

But if we can’t meet our fundraising goals before our critical end-of-month deadline, we’ll have reasons to worry.

That’s because these very extreme Democrats are targeting OUR Congressman, because they know he’s the only thing keeping them from unleashing socialism all over our beautiful nation. That’s why Nancy Pelosi, Emily’s List, and other radicals have pledged millions to taking down our Congressman -- because they see his dedicated conservative record of tax cuts, spending reform, and support for our border wall.

This fundraising end-of-month deadline will define the course of our campaign, and if we can’t reach our goals, we’ll be a tough spot moving forward. [https://secure.campaignsolutions.com/stevechabot/donation1/?InitiativeKey=IKBQNP650LDM]

Will you pitch in before our deadline to stand with Steve? The deadline hits at the end of the month -- it's rapidly approaching. You can donate here. [https://secure.campaignsolutions.com/stevechabot/donation1/?InitiativeKey=IKBQNP650LDM]

PITCH IN $25 TODAY [https://secure.campaignsolutions.com/stevechabot/donation1/?InitiativeKey=IKBQNP650LDM] PITCH IN $50 TODAY [https://secure.campaignsolutions.com/stevechabot/donation1/?InitiativeKey=IKBQNP650LDM] PITCH IN $100 TODAY [https://secure.campaignsolutions.com/stevechabot/donation1/?InitiativeKey=IKBQNP650LDM] PITCH IN $250 TODAY [https://secure.campaignsolutions.com/stevechabot/donation1/?InitiativeKey=IKBQNP650LDM] PITCH IN OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.campaignsolutions.com/stevechabot/donation1/?InitiativeKey=IKBQNP650LDM]

Thank you.

Ryan

Grassroots Engagement Director -- Team Chabot

Friend,

I emailed you.

My sons, Don Jr. and Eric, both emailed you.

Newt Gingrich emailed you.

The Trump Finance Team emailed you.

And now I'm emailing you. Again.

Our August fundraising deadline is at 11:59 PM TONIGHT.

My team just sent me the updated list of everyone who has donated to help us reach our $2,000,000 goal, and I noticed that your name is still **MISSING.**

The FAKE NEWS media has been running non-stop LIES and attacks against us since the day I took office. That's why we NEED to make sure we have the resources to fight back and make sure the American people know the TRUTH.

There has NEVER been a more important time for YOU to get involved. That's why I've authorized my team to **TRIPLE-MATCH** all donations until 11:59 PM TONIGHT.

name: Team Stanton
subject: AZ Republic: "Nation takes note as Phoenix votes"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Earlier this week, Greg told you it was a **_really big deal_** that Phoenix voters overwhelmingly rejected the dark money-backed propositions to defund our public transit, parks, libraries, and senior services.

And the Arizona Republic agrees...

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/dIYEVaVDb5u-rGEApWtOCUJLqDiC1fSlFZhigtlWdvs=/9GPCY6RDEmb1AdGKQfNihp8PEPGAzDaA4hn3yaj2SCw=?refcode=X_083119_EOM_D&amount=3&recurring=auto)

There is no doubt about it -- if we can drive record voter turnout statewide in Arizona in 2020, we can win up-and-down the ballot.

_That 's why Greg is so committed to his new 2020 Turn-Out-The-Vote Fund to drive record turnout in Arizona! _

[**Click here to donate to Greg 's 2020 Turn-Out-The-Vote Fund to help us win in 2020 »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/dIYEVaVDb5u-rGEApWtOCUJLqDiC1fSlFZhigtlWdvs=/9GPCY6RDEmb1AdGKQfNihp8PEPGAzDaA4hn3yaj2SCw=?refcode=X_083119_EOM_D&amount=3&recurring=auto)

name: Chirlane McCray
subject: Update re: We're almost there
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020
body:
Give our fight for working people a jolt of momentum. Step up by tonight's deadline.
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e5f/1630b3eb/51627253/5f54a801/3258288250/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxNyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_augeom?refcode=717_org_em_fr")
Friend,
Did you see Bill's message yesterday?
We're pushing to reach this goal of 1,000 additional donations by the end of the month because it'll give our fight for working people a big jolt of momentum heading into the fall -- but the deadline is tonight, and we still have 428 contributions to go.
Can you step up now?
**[Contribute $1 today to give our fight for working people a jolt of momentum. We still have 428 contributions to go, and the deadline is tonight.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e5f/1630b3eb/51627253/5f54a801/3258288250/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxNyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_augeom?refcode=717_org_em_fr")**
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e5f/1630b3eb/51627253/5f54a801/3258288250/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxNyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_augeom?refcode=717_org_em_fr")
We're all in this race with Bill to put working people first. Reaching this goal by tonight will help power that effort.
Thanks for being in this with us,
Chirlane

\------Original Message------
Friend,
Yesterday our team shared that we needed only 1,000 more contributions before the end of August to beat our financial projections and head toward the October debate cutoff with a big jolt of momentum. And people across the country have really responded -- we're now just 636 more contributions away from that goal.
**But this isn 't just about reaching goals and meeting deadlines. This is about our ability to fight for working people throughout America.**
I'm in this race to FIGHT for working people -- and that's why I'm asking for your support before the month ends tomorrow at midnight.
**[Contribute $1 today to help this campaign keep fighting for working people-- and to help beat our projections for August.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e5f/1630b3eb/51627253/5f54a801/3258288250/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxNyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_augeom?refcode=717_org_em_fr")**
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e5f/1630b3eb/51627253/5f54a801/3258288250/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxNyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_augeom?refcode=717_org_em_fr")
Fighting for working people isn't easy. Every time progressives try to get something done, there's someone telling us to slow down, be quiet, or settle for less.
But in New York City, on one of the biggest stages in the world, we've proven progressives can win.
People said businesses would flee when we raised New York City's minimum wage to $15/hour and ensured everyone had the right to paid sick leave -- but we now have the strongest economy in our history. People said it was too ambitious to enact free, full-day pre-K for every child in the city, but we did it in less time than anyone expected.
We have no intention of slowing down when it comes to fighting for working people like you -- we're speeding up. But we can't do it without you.
**[Contribute $1 today to help us beat our August projections and do more to help working people.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e5f/1630b3eb/51627253/5f54a801/3258288250/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxNyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_augeom?refcode=717_org_em_fr")**
While others may be content to close the book on August, we're making a big push to grow stronger as we head into this new month. Your fellow supporters are stepping up to reach this goal, but we need everyone to come together right now -- including you.
Let's do this,
Bill

[CONTRIBUTE»](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e5f/1630b3eb/51627253/5f54a801/3258288250/VEsHAg/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxNyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_augeom?refcode=717_org_em_fr")
---

PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you'd like to unsubscribe, you can click [_here_](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e5f/1630b3eb/51627253/5f54a80b/3258288250/VEsHDQ/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/unsubscribe"), but we'd hate to see you go. Learn more about [Bill's campaign](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e5f/1630b3eb/51627253/5f54a80a/3258288250/VEsHDA/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://billdeblasio.com/") here.

| The good news is that once people learn about me and my platform, they are excited. Think about it -- at one point you didn’t know who I was either -- and now you’re a part of the Yang Gang! Pretty incredible stuff.

My message is this -- we must put humanity first. Whether that’s my plan for a Freedom Dividend, $1,000 a month for every American adult with no strings attached, my aggressive but realistic climate plan, or my plan to restore trust in our democracy.

**A lot of these campaigns have raised more money than ours (and they’re definitely outspending us), but they don’t have the capacity for growth like our campaign does.** Their ceiling for growth is kind of baked in. No one knows what our ceiling is. But we’re going to find out together.

Our message is catching fire as the American people are getting more and more excited about our campaign. Though the media might try to deny it, we are a top campaign by any objective measure -- polling, fundraising, grassroots network. In fact, in some polls we’re pulling ahead of candidates like Cory Booker, Beto O’Rourke, and Pete Buttigieg in early primary states.

clean_body: Please give what you can so we can hit our August fundraising goal before midnight and share our message with as many voters as possible | | | | | Friend -- | I wouldn’t ask you if we didn’t really need it. The importance of this fundraising is pretty simple. I need to introduce myself to more and more Americans because the truth is most Americans don’t know who I am. And the issues we’re fighting for here are too important to be ignored. Please give what you can so we can hit our August fundraising goal before midnight and share our message with as many voters as possible: | | The good news is that once people learn about me and my platform, they are excited. Think about it -- at one point you didn’t know who I was either -- and now you’re a part of the Yang Gang! Pretty incredible stuff. My message is this -- we must put humanity first. Whether that’s my plan for a Freedom Dividend, $1,000 a month for every American adult with no strings attached, my aggressive but realistic climate plan, or my plan to restore trust in our democracy. A lot of these campaigns have raised more money than ours (and they’re definitely outspending us), but they don’t have the capacity for growth like our campaign does. Their ceiling for growth is kind of baked in. No one knows what our ceiling is. But we’re going to find out together. Our message is catching fire as the American people are getting more and more excited about our campaign. Though the media might try to deny it, we are a top campaign by any objective measure -- polling, fundraising, grassroots network. In fact, in some polls we’re pulling ahead of candidates like Cory Booker, Beto O’Rourke, and Pete Buttigieg in early primary states. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | | \- Andrew | | Can you make a donation today? Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people. | | ****Join the Yang Gang! If you want to get more involved and help fuel this movement, please . | | | Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality. | | | | | | | All rights reserved. New York, NY #HumanityFirst | No longer want to receive these emails? . Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Tim Walz
subject: Quick note
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor |
body:
My friend,

I hope your Labor Day weekend is off to a great start -- I’ll keep this brief so you can get back to it ASAP.

My campaign team just let me know we’re still trailing our August budget target by about $1,800. I have complete confidence we can make it up by midnight, but we need to act fast.

Will you pitch in $5 or more to help us get there? We’re tracking contributions through this secure link:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/august-eom-tw

We can’t afford to fall behind now. The pressure is only going to build as we get closer to 2020. Thank you for helping us finish strong.

Tim Walz

Sent from my iPhone

clean_body: = Peter, Today is our end of the month deadline. We are getting closer and closer to the end of the quarter and need your help to boost our fundraising numbers. We are up against some tough odds — McCaul is the third richest member of Congress. But, we were able to gain 15 points last election with our limited resources. Now, we are ready to bring the fight to his door. We have a big goal to run a people-powered campaign — no funding from corporate PACs, but lots of support from regular folks who want their representatives to fight for what matters most. Healthcare and good jobs; clean air and clean water; accountability for corrupt officials; and common decency and respect instead of hate and division. Our shared vision of getting rid of our absentee representation has never been closer. All the work we did last election is paying off. Our campaign’s work, reaching out to voters and exciting the base, turned this district from a solid red district into a national battleground. name: Mark Warner
subject: I want to tell you why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
At the end of this email, I'm going to ask you to donate to my campaign. But first I want to tell you why I'm asking.
---
| | Derek,

At the end of this email, I'm going to ask you to donate to my campaign. But first I want to tell you why I'm asking.

The truth is, I feel lucky every single day to serve the people of Virginia in the U.S. Senate, but there's still so much we need to do together, including expanding access to healthcare, securing our elections, and holding the Trump administration accountable.

But frankly, this re-election fight won't be an easy one. In 2014, I won by less than one percentage point, and back then there was no "Trump Victory Initiative" deploying Republican operatives across Virginia. The stakes are even higher this year because we know that Donald Trump sees Virginia as an important part of his path to re-election. That's why he's investing in the Commonwealth, and that's why I've been working hard to not just keep Virginia blue in 2020, but to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in 2019.

**I want to thank you for all the support you 've given me so far. But we have to work even harder right now if we're going to send Donald Trump a message and make real change happen in Virginia and across the country. We have our biggest deadline to date coming up tonight at midnight, and candidly I really need your help to hit our fundraising goal: Will you make your first donation to help us hit our goal and make sure our campaign doesn't fall behind?** No kidding, even $1 makes a difference because it all adds up on Election Day. You can give at this link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-augeom4nd](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d132/53d9897e/52e35265/1c8e2e02/1908760921/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-augeom4nd?refcode=20190831nd__198__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Thank you,
Mark

_Your supporter record is based on our digital contribution records associated with this email address. If you recently contributed via mail or in another way, thank you so much!_
---
|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d132/53d9897e/52e35265/1c8e2e01/1908760921/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---

name: Official Bennet Campaign HQ
subject: determination and grit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team, we know you're getting a lot of emails right now explaining how August is traditionally a slow fundraising month and how important your help is.

That is especially true here at the Bennet for America headquarters.

Since the DNC has decided to block Michael from participating in the next debate with its arbitrary rules, showing strong August fundraising numbers is more important than ever.

The fact of the matter is this: [**our campaign is fueled by the donations of thousands of online grassroots supporters like you.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac33/134673f2/ba49242/69962858/943561003/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_083119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Not corporate interests, or celebrity notoriety, or a self-funded billionaire.

[**It 's friends like you stepping up to help make a difference. Can you pitch in at this crucial moment to keep our grassroots campaign on track? **](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac33/134673f2/ba49242/69962858/943561003/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_083119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Defeating Donald Trump won't be a cakewalk, but Michael has something Trump doesn't - determination and grit.

As a senator from a purple state, Michael has never known an easy election, and he'll win this race the way he always has: [**by presenting a compelling and unifying vision for our country.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac33/134673f2/ba49242/69962858/943561003/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_083119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**Together, we can make sure Michael 's voice is not blocked from future debates. From: Elisa <info@elisacardnell.com>
Date: Fri, Aug 30, 2019
Subject: Tonight’s Deadline
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Peter,
Tomorrow marks the end of August, and we are on track to have our strongest month yet. We are just **$4,948.57** away from hitting our monthly goal, and I want to take a brief moment to explain why these goals are so important.
When we hit or miss a goal, it impacts how much time I get to spend out in the district with voters and listening to their needs for our community. And I would much rather be out there than dialing for dollars and worrying about fundraising numbers.
My GOP opponent has his dark-money allies behind him, but I have you, Peter.**So I’m counting on you to come through now and give before our end-of-month deadline – whatever you can – and your gift will be matched.**
**_If you've saved payment on ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._**

clean_body: = Hey Peter, Did you get a chance to read Elisa’s email yesterday? Since then we’ve made a ton of progress and are only $1,193.57 away from reaching our goal. As Elisa’s finance director, I wanted to let you know how important it is for us to reach these monthly goals in order to make Dan Crenshaw a one-term Congressman. Just a reminder that all donations that come in before midnight will be matched, so your support means twice as much today. Thanks for all that you do, Khadijah Naeem Finance Director \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Elisa <info@elisacardnell.com> Date: Fri, Aug 30, 2019 Subject: Tonight’s Deadline To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, Tomorrow marks the end of August, and we are on track to have our strongest month yet. We are just $4,948.57 away from hitting our monthly goal, and I want to take a brief moment to explain why these goals are so important. When we hit or miss a goal, it impacts how much time I get to spend out in the district with voters and listening to their needs for our community. And I would much rather be out there than dialing for dollars and worrying about fundraising numbers. My GOP opponent has his dark-money allies behind him, but I have you, Peter.So I’m counting on you to come through now and give before our end-of-month deadline – whatever you can – and your gift will be matched. If you've saved payment on ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = 50&refcode=expresslane 50 = 100&refcode=expresslane 100 = 250&refcode=expresslane 250 = 500&refcode=expresslane 500 Thank you, Elisa Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress Elisa Cardnell for Congress PO Box 667253 Houston, TX 77266 United States

name: Roger Lau
subject: Last chance for August
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Today is our last chance to reach our August fundraising goals and make sure this campaign has the resources it needs to keep growing. We're a little short of where we need to be -- but a big spike... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852926d/45c30650/13a323937/6686357e/3093090808/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
At midnight, our August fundraising will officially close and we'll know whether we've hit our goals for the month.

On a different type of campaign, we would spend tonight chasing down last-minute big-dollar donations, or counting our $2,800 checks, scrambling to close any gaps in our fundraising numbers.

But if we hit our goal tonight, it will mean so much more -- because we'd know that every part of it came from grassroots donors like you.

**Today is our last chance to reach our August fundraising goals and make sure this campaign has the resources it needs to keep growing. We 're a little short of where we need to be -- but a big spike in the next few hours would close the gap.**

**[We need a few more people to make a contribution for the first time tonight. name: Donald J. Trump
subject: LAST DAY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
We are still short of our goal. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=57e6d8221c946d825a291587a896edff6dd9025a9ec409e7e585090022f44dca43d0b432bd63a9d9d93274203455341470d0b01b33fca913)
---

Friend,

I emailed you.

My sons, Don Jr. and Eric, both emailed you.

Newt Gingrich emailed you.

The Trump Finance Team emailed you.

And now I'm emailing you. Again.

Our August fundraising deadline is at 11:59 PM TONIGHT.

My team just sent me the updated list of everyone who has donated to help us reach our $2,000,000 goal, and I noticed that your name is still **MISSING.**

The FAKE NEWS media has been running non-stop LIES and attacks against us since the day I took office. That's why we NEED to make sure we have the resources to fight back and make sure the American people know the TRUTH.

There has NEVER been a more important time for YOU to get involved. That's why I've authorized my team to **TRIPLE-MATCH** all donations until 11:59 PM TONIGHT.
---
|
**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to make TRIPLE the impact and help us CRUSH our August goal.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d17a92f2cd79c38f92bbf05d22c166e687e9da8413f550b3b0ef80a1fa343c68b1295aa1a8579d6e40521633abb2e24b7766859d8a280811)**

**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT to get your contribution TRIPLE-MATCHED and get on the list my team sends me.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d17a92f2cd79c38f5725fbc362b2e49d3188ac6492caa72393fe14165f49307d4f8726a8bef08092807e4de1b1c12bf97b31891ebb0d4379)**

body:
I asked. Speaker Pelosi asked. Khizr Khan asked. James Carville asked. Deb Haaland asked. Ted Lieu asked. Gabby Giffords asked. Paul Begala asked. Now I'm asking again.
---
| | I asked.
Speaker Pelosi asked.
Khizr Khan asked.
James Carville asked.
Deb Haaland asked.
Ted Lieu asked.
Gabby Giffords asked.
Paul Begala asked.
Now I'm asking again.

After my closest Democratic colleagues told you how important tonight's deadline is to winning my Senate race, I hoped I would see a surge of support.

**But unfortunately, it 's starting to look like I might not meet my end-of-month goal. **

I have 14 hours left before my deadline. But you've never let me down before. Not once. I'm counting on you to pull through for me one more time. | [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4c5/18e32a7f/525f4797/7beb1108/41954897/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190831_em_fr_b1_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")
**dpwillis67@gmail.com**
[ _**Suggested Support: $5 >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4c5/18e32a7f/525f4797/7beb1108/41954897/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190831_em_fr_b1_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")
---
I need to be completely honest with you: **If we lose this race, we will have zero chance of winning the Senate.**

That's why President Trump and Mitch McConnell are outright targeting my state.

I can't overstate how important your $5 is before tonight's deadline. Can I count on you?
| **[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4c5/18e32a7f/525f4797/7beb1109/41954897/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190831_em_fr_b1_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")**

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4c5/18e32a7f/525f4797/7beb1100/41954897/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4c5/18e32a7f/525f4797/7beb1101/41954897/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4c5/18e32a7f/525f4797/7beb1106/41954897/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben

Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Morley
subject: [climate change] we must have this debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Climate change is an important issue team, but the DNC is refusing to hold a debate on the topic.

We think that's a mistake. This issue affects all of us, no matter how you vote or where you live.

Tim is calling on his colleagues in the presidential primary to join us for a debate on climate change in Youngstown, Ohio.

[**If you agree we should have a debate on climate change, add your name today.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9de5/5486deaa/3ee04c6d/dc83a6d/2957849015/VEsH/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/climate-debate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+If+you+agree+we+should+have+a+debate+on+&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190831_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190831_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190831_1_1")

You can read more about it below.

**\----- Begin forward message -----**
> Climate change is not a Democratic or a Republican issue. **Climate change is an American issue.**
>
> And right now it is one of the most important issues facing our country. That's why I'm inviting the other presidential candidates to join me in a debate on climate change in Northeast Ohio.
>
> We need to discuss this issue in front of an audience of steelworkers, miners, and others who would benefit from a green economy.
>
> [**Sign on now. Join me in asking colleagues in the presidential primary to hold a climate debate in Youngstown, Ohio as a matter of priority. Add your name here.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9de5/5486deaa/3ee04c6d/dc83a6c/2957849015/VEsE/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/climate-debate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+Sign+on+now+Join+me+in+asking+colleagues&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190831_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190831_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190831_1_1")
>
> [SIGN THE CLIMATE DEBATE PETITION](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9de5/5486deaa/3ee04c6d/dc83a6f/2957849015/VEsF/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/climate-debate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+SIGN+THE+CLIMATE+DEBATE+PETITION&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190831_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190831_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190831_1_1")
> My friend, Governor Jay Inslee, did a great service to our country by elevating the issue of climate change during his presidential campaign. Millions of Americans now understand the future of not just our country -- but our planet -- is at stake if we do not take immediate action.
>
> The current administration refuses to take the threat of climate change seriously. Rather than lead, this administration is full of climate-deniers who are putting their own selfish interests over those of the American people.
>
> [**Climate change is not a left wing or right wing issue, it is an American issue - and that is why I'm asking the other candidates to join me in Ohio. Add your name today >>>**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9de5/5486deaa/3ee04c6d/dc83a6e/2957849015/VEsC/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/climate-debate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=4+-+Climate+change+is+not+a+left+wing+or+rig&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190831_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190831_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190831_1_1")
>
> Thanks for your support on this critical issue.
>
> Tim
>
>
>
>
>

|
---
Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
Contribute now to help Tim take his vision for our future across the United States! [**Donate now.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9de5/5486deaa/3ee04c6d/dc83a11/2957849015/VEsD/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-emfooter?amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=5+-+Donate+now&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190831_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190831_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190831_1_1")

**We know email can be overwhelming,**
so if you'd like to receive only the most important updates, you can join our email-lite list [here](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9de5/5486deaa/3ee04c6d/dc83a10/2957849015/VEsA/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://timryan.cp.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190831_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190831_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190831_1_1"), or unsubscribe from all email by [ clicking here.](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9de5/5486deaa/3ee04c6d/dc83a13/2957849015/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiIzZWUwNGM2ZCIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6ImQ3YTlkZTUifQ==/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/oneclickunsubscribe/3ee04c6d/d7a9de5?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=7+-++clicking+here&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190831_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190831_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190831_1_1")

In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55.
For 2020, we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating Trump and turning Arizona blue. We recruited astronaut Mark Kelly to run for Arizona's US Senate seat, are working to win a key Arizona Congressional seat and to flip both houses of the Arizona State Legislature.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Some campaigns can fall short. Here’s why we can’t:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
We haven’t taken a dime from special interests, corporations, or D.C. lobbyists. Instead, we are 100% focused on people and the things we can do together to make the lives of our fellow Americans better.
#
I’ll make this quick since we’re still out on this long road trip. I’m grateful for all of you who have made a critical donation towards our important August goal. It’s a goal we really can’t miss, and I want to tell you why.
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30688?refcode=ema20190831-52323&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=52323%2E444211%2ElgRSbh)
People want to know if this campaign has momentum. They want to know if they too should support us out of all the candidates reaching out to them. When you make a contribution (or, as is often the case, an additional contribution), it really helps them believe that this is possible, that we’re building something historic, that their support can make a difference, and that they’ll find themselves in the best company with people like you across the country.
[Can you contribute now to take us over the finish line and help us close out August? Every donation before midnight will be counted towards the goal.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30688?refcode=ema20190831-52323&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=52323%2E444211%2ElgRSbh)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30688?refcode=ema20190831-52323&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=52323%2E444211%2ElgRSbh)**
You already know that we don’t take PAC money. We haven’t taken a dime from special interests, corporations, or D.C. lobbyists. Instead, we are 100% focused on people and the things we can do together to make the lives of our fellow Americans better. It’s the best way to run, and I truly believe the only way to win.
That’s why we’ve been on the road nonstop these past many days. We were just in South Carolina and North Carolina and Virginia. We had town halls and round tables and conversations. We talked about ending gun violence and fighting climate change and achieving universal health care and rewriting our immigration laws in our own image.
But to keep going and keep fighting and keep showing up everywhere, for everyone, every single day, we’re going to need to hit our August goal by tonight. Some campaigns can afford to miss their goals by a little—fall a bit short—and still make things work. We’ve got to hit ours, and it’s going to take all of us.
That’s why we’re counting on your support through emails like this one. [Even $5 goes a long way -- click here to give before the deadline.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30688?refcode=ema20190831-52323&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=52323%2E444211%2ElgRSbh)
Thanks for all you do to make this possible,
Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=52323%2E444211%2ElgRSbh). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Sara Gideon
subject: Hitting our fundraising goal tonight is how we keep ourselves on track to present a really big number at the next FEC reporting deadline.
body:
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802df0/4bef7a87/6811273a/287f1e9c/1994355008/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
This team has accomplished a lot since we launched our campaign at the end of June.
We raised over a million dollars in our first week - and we did it the right way, largely through small-dollar donations.
After our announcement, Nate Silver labeled this one of the "most flippable" Senate seats in the country. And _Cook Political Report_ just changed our race rating from "leans Republican" to "toss-up."
We haven't fallen short of a challenge yet - and it's all thanks to supporters like you. That's why I know I can count on you now:
[**Make a $3 contribution before our August fundraising deadline hits at midnight tonight. We 've still got a few hours left! **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802df0/4bef7a87/6811273a/287f1e93/1994355008/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA4MzEtMS1mdWxsIn0=/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-august-eom?refcode=em190831-1-full")
This deadline is a big deal. Hitting our fundraising goal tonight is how we keep ourselves on track to present a _really_ big number at the next FEC reporting deadline, and how we keep pace with Susan Collins' numbers.
Remember, this is going to be a long campaign, but the work we're doing now will set us up for success down the road.
All my best,
_Sara_

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine

name: Latinos for Trump
subject: White House Briefing
body:
White House Briefing 2019 We recently visited the White House. Latinos for Trump and Leaderes de la Comunidad represented Texas at a Faith Based Brie
| |

[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=83130.1224.1.964f43cd6927237c34249d2534931a19) |
---
# White House Briefing 2019
---
**We recently visited the White House. Latinos for Trump and Leaderes de la Comunidad represented Texas at a Faith Based Briefing this past week. Great things are happening in DC under the current administration. We were briefed on an immigration plan that will be rolled out in the upcoming weeks, briefed on the progress that has been made on the opioid crisis, and were briefed on the may initiates and legal stances President Trump is taking to protect our religious liberties. It was very clear that we must keep the President in office for his stance on the very policies we advocate for. Most important: he most recently defunded Planned Parenthood!**
---
Don't forget to join us in Laredo Texas to appreciate our Border Patrol agents and veterans on September 11, 2019. We will be feeding approximately 400 agents. Any donations will be greatly appreciated. You can register here:
https://www.eventbrite.com/e/americanos-lft-border-patrol-appreciation-tickets-68096641889?aff=ebdssbdestsearch Visit latinosfortrump.us for more information or to follow us click on the links below. Also, check out our upcoming events. Share them but most important register to join us!

body:
My August End of Month deadline is only a few hours away, help me meet it! Our country is under attack, I am committed to defending our nation from

Peter,
My August End of Month deadline is only a few hours away, help me meet it!
Our country is under attack, I am committed to defending our nation from socialist and liberal attacks.
Peter, this deadline is not like other deadlines... this one is critical in combating the surge of liberal elites influencing our country, and threatening to replace our Kansas values with theirs.
It’s time that we stand up to the likes of Nancy Pelosi, Bernie Sanders, and Chuck Schumer, and show that we are NOT in agreement when radical socialists pedal “more free stuff.”
This deadline is our chance to make a statement.
****[End of Month Deadline: $20>>](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=7a7c4c7c8fed4631813ba8893577d1cf&_e=hE35Ma5T6QJQl8zaUSjcn7I-g52EsjCFeK6znVUxEVOX-aVfQ_aTNIW6jVciab2Ca0Yp2revZ8w1h7Ny8dMDuwftapRJ2Y2snQ7CfKem1MHXIwfXoHY6CavgJGGGEA32_3uJAzCRiRF5Dma0sZ_4-dj3oXxnuk7qUDfldOJEWly3XC_5QF5frzwSFv_Z7eeJLs5TRmNA3sL5wHsrRQUc4IDjc4L76fH6IJEUd62MpTFGLqyxY4UALllKV7f8n2zafkjPlaaXwZuyfCeNOC7pamwgooWpMdMOlpftDf7BnqthWagj2axrCZvu6Pj86U51bunS4SlIYQjJtbGq1pi78kU-naDx_KveTN02yOmkzETYQXFyAy1sMSByZILikLLI-8DfJ0qaNIXgVLqSJJm8qafDuuC4n14aCQAkpvPY2Vf83n47gApTPAPLmIRAlLWS)****
---
Peter, I’m counting on you to join me in issuing a flat-out DENIAL of these proposals threatening to drive up our taxes and send our deficit through the roof.
And with characters like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and the rest of the “Squad” becoming the sweethearts of the Democratic Party, the time has never been more critical to stand up for conservative values.

**[Can I count on you to help me stop the radical left from eroding the values of our great country?](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=7a7c4c7c8fed4631813ba8893577d1cf&_e=hE35Ma5T6QJQl8zaUSjcn7I-g52EsjCFeK6znVUxEVOX-aVfQ_aTNIW6jVciab2CTBEvYmIvj0yPYdtixnxXb_sMT9_ZEzk-_97bRo6ziJuiUZIfBbhpfhq7_2VHe2IAZPSd462NmURE1VrRtbugU3mXxnmBJ60Cmgi06Oko1YJ0yA7P05NnDCPHHqC9gK2SH4umNSJGbWaas-KIOk76EAv5qQGVLYQgMy1G5zZZ3_8icMlVnZ-7JOU1nWMsRaHNYuXvOu4NWY-REzUmy1NDd7f5XYhSZIUrzT4dUaJZ6eYFbb-nVsOgkWiSOX7KGmcaKFuZPrlS1Bk6PnYMDFJSqsVeARFSIolkWZikPlOqPy4NIfIw1xyC_i9_yQqF3p-M3Oqv2HDMJe86s9glNDmhLdHhEqcEpLDzNyIH7z-Xx60%3D) **
****[DEFEND KANSAS: END OF MONTH DEADLINE>>](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=7a7c4c7c8fed4631813ba8893577d1cf&_e=hE35Ma5T6QJQl8zaUSjcn7I-g52EsjCFeK6znVUxEVOX-aVfQ_aTNIW6jVciab2CTBEvYmIvj0yPYdtixnxXb_sMT9_ZEzk-_97bRo6ziJuiUZIfBbhpfhq7_2VHe2IAZPSd462NmURE1VrRtbugU3mXxnmBJ60Cmgi06Oko1YJ0yA7P05NnDCPHHqC9gK2S0A92k2Ni-TqUrsm6p0hyS4bcPg64cWuGJvL4vUq4uQW5Re-NvonhlGUWHMF1GkCshxOOxb6NxT9zMebkGqd62DFcoxjMxs_uraWrI5SnoUgKGKdQj3yVPQ9kBlPc7QtAb_x44JgcQLEdpDPv_jYZJuFHHdQ_0CDGLGO97Myz3tWLwIrxXYTYvWlU9r6V1B648EzOEUkIfQmY6jzGNsoJ5bOqNleKXOUBGdTViq8AvbE%3D)****
---
If we fail to meet our goal, we’ll send a clear message to the Democrats that we are okay with their open borders and socialist ideas. Will you let that happen, Peter?
**[Chip into my End of Month fund before it’s too late.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=7a7c4c7c8fed4631813ba8893577d1cf&_e=hE35Ma5T6QJQl8zaUSjcn7I-g52EsjCFeK6znVUxEVOX-aVfQ_aTNIW6jVciab2Ca0Yp2revZ8w1h7Ny8dMDuwftapRJ2Y2snQ7CfKem1MHXIwfXoHY6CavgJGGGEA32_3uJAzCRiRF5Dma0sZ_4-dj3oXxnuk7qUDfldOJEWly3XC_5QF5frzwSFv_Z7eeJLs5TRmNA3sL5wHsrRQUc4LMo1r5LNHu6S5tcPWz_ueZHgBlP5b3nUmH8BqbnjZ24sp5jNfawi22-8wU25baepK0GEemhQngrt1IcOnRzXfEld7fwB2Cfkkzikb9oPa8O3afuWTyI55OoXzLTg8SoEWEr2ry8tdEzrA_PG-grBFsU-zKWEYiVYrRqyJAqjyB0jgOkuKpti6Jy-NluWpRd7mhnzWmlZhEecZ9ydK5yoxY8tJEB8MheCnRH85I5Gc2S) **

name: Jim Hood
subject: I need to ask for your help
body:
|
---
Voters across the state -- Republican and Democrat -- have reached out to pledge their support, make a contribution, and ask for a yard sign.
Friend,

I have been so humbled by the outpouring of support that we have received this week since we officially kicked off the general election against Lt. Gov. Tate Reeves.

Voters across the state -- Republican and Democrat -- have reached out to pledge their support, make a contribution, and ask for a yard sign. I'm so grateful to see Mississippians rallying around our campaign and our vision for this great state.

**Your support has been incredible, but I need to ask for your help once more. Today is our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and it 's crucial that we make August our strongest month yet.**

**Will you make a contribution before midnight tonight?**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/2OOqg4XneGfdwGjhVv98QLQiO26MPlyxLfZ5PE7sFvc=/D4dFFBiRjY4E8_Ayl1FdXG3WCYph1gTpg0Mppr4Hmr8=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190831nd&amount=5)**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/2OOqg4XneGfdwGjhVv98QLQiO26MPlyxLfZ5PE7sFvc=/D4dFFBiRjY4E8_Ayl1FdXG3WCYph1gTpg0Mppr4Hmr8=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190831nd&amount=10)**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/2OOqg4XneGfdwGjhVv98QLQiO26MPlyxLfZ5PE7sFvc=/D4dFFBiRjY4E8_Ayl1FdXG3WCYph1gTpg0Mppr4Hmr8=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190831nd&amount=25)**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/2OOqg4XneGfdwGjhVv98QLQiO26MPlyxLfZ5PE7sFvc=/D4dFFBiRjY4E8_Ayl1FdXG3WCYph1gTpg0Mppr4Hmr8=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190831nd&amount=50)**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/2OOqg4XneGfdwGjhVv98QLQiO26MPlyxLfZ5PE7sFvc=/D4dFFBiRjY4E8_Ayl1FdXG3WCYph1gTpg0Mppr4Hmr8=?refcode=20190831nd)**
I know that Tate Reeves will be working overtime to rebuild his war chest after his bruising primary, and we can't afford to let him pull ahead.

Kandi and Meg let me know that all contributions through the end of the month will be matched by a group of supporters, and I was blown away. It's clear that momentum is on our side as we enter the general election.

I wouldn't have entered this race if I didn't think we could win, and I'm more convinced than ever that we will defeat Tate Reeves in November and build a better Mississippi for everyone.

**[We can't do it alone. Can I count on you to help us end the month strong?](https://act.myngp.com/el/2OOqg4XneGfdwGjhVv98QLQiO26MPlyxLfZ5PE7sFvc=/D4dFFBiRjY4E8_Ayl1FdXG3WCYph1gTpg0Mppr4Hmr8=?refcode=20190831nd&amount=10)**

Thank you, and I hope you enjoy a safe long weekend with your families.

\-- Jim

clean_body: | Voters across the state -- Republican and Democrat -- have reached out to pledge their support, make a contribution, and ask for a yard sign. Friend, I have been so humbled by the outpouring of support that we have received this week since we officially kicked off the general election against Lt. Gov. Tate Reeves. Voters across the state -- Republican and Democrat -- have reached out to pledge their support, make a contribution, and ask for a yard sign. I'm so grateful to see Mississippians rallying around our campaign and our vision for this great state. Your support has been incredible, but I need to ask for your help once more. Today is our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and it 's crucial that we make August our strongest month yet. Will you make a contribution before midnight tonight? If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: I know that Tate Reeves will be working overtime to rebuild his war chest after his bruising primary, and we can't afford to let him pull ahead. Kandi and Meg let me know that all contributions through the end of the month will be matched by a group of supporters, and I was blown away. It's clear that momentum is on our side as we enter the general election. I wouldn't have entered this race if I didn't think we could win, and I'm more convinced than ever that we will defeat Tate Reeves in November and build a better Mississippi for everyone. Thank you, and I hope you enjoy a safe long weekend with your families. \-- Jim | |

name: Dan Baer
subject: Fox News just announced:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
Democrats are closing in on McConnell's lead in the polls.
|
---

| | I just got the news:

Mitch McConnell is at risk of losing his seat after getting a challenge from Amy McGrath, a career public servant with national security experience just like me.

Democrats are closing in on his lead in the polls.

And here's the kicker: Fox News just admitted Moscow Mitch has the worst favorability in the Senate.

This election is our best shot in a decade to oust Mitch McConnell and flip the entire Senate for Democrats.

But our chances plummet if we lose my race here in Colorado. Nate Silver, CNN, and MSNBC all agree it's a must-win.

I'm 33 gifts short of funding my next round of ads and outreach to win this campaign. Can you help me before my End of Month Deadline at midnight?

Democrats are closing in on his lead in the polls. And here's the kicker: Fox News just admitted Moscow Mitch has the worst favorability in the Senate. This election is our best shot in a decade to oust Mitch McConnell and flip the entire Senate for Democrats. But our chances plummet if we lose my race here in Colorado. Nate Silver, CNN, and MSNBC all agree it's a must-win. I'm 33 gifts short of funding my next round of ads and outreach to win this campaign. Can you help me before my End of Month Deadline at midnight? | | "" "" "" "" "" Thanks, Dan "" "" Colorado is the most important Senate race in the entire country according to Nate Silver and CNN. It's our only chance of flipping the Senate. And to win the most important Senate race, we need the most qualified candidate. Dan served as an Ambassador under President Obama and as the head of the Colorado Department of Higher Education in Governor Hickenlooper's cabinet. If elected, he would be the first openly gay man to serve in Senate history. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
“A deal is all but sealed with Japan,” Fox Business reports. “It’s a very big transaction and we’ve agreed in principle.” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b8bb57994d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [G-7 Summit: Trump Strikes 'Billion-Dollar' Trade Deal with Japan](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1a338f6e10&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox Business
“A deal is all but sealed with Japan,” Fox Business reports. “It’s a very big transaction and we’ve agreed in principle,” President Donald J. Trump confirmed alongside Prime Minister Shinzo Abe at the G-7 summit in France this week. President Trump said the Prime Minister agreed to purchase large sums of American farmers’ corn and “expects the billion-dollar deal to be sealed by the time the U.N. General Assembly meets in mid-September.”

[**Watch:** President Trump and the First Lady at the G-7 in France](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8ccbf1260f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Good Riddance to the Flores Decree](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=98617147e0&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“The Trump administration announced last week it will terminate the Flores settlement agreement, a 1997 court decree that has prevented U.S. officials from detaining migrant families and unaccompanied minors for more than 20 days,” John Daniel Davidson writes. “Ending the settlement was the right call. More than any other single policy, it has created a magnet for illegal immigration, essentially guaranteeing entry to unaccompanied minors and any adult who crosses the Rio Grande with a child.”

**Watch:** [The border wall is being built!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4d7b85c8a6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Younger Workers Report Biggest Gains in Happiness With Pay](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e8032b1d0f&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
The total share of American workers satisfied with their paychecks rose last year, and “the biggest leap came from millennials and Generation Z,” Lauren Weber reports. “In all, nearly 54% of U.S. workers said they were satisfied with their jobs in 2018, the highest share reported in more than two decades.”
---
|
---
| [James Comey Wants an Apology? This is Myth Becoming Madness](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=929fbaf4c8&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Hill_
“The new Justice Department inspector general report released on Thursday establishes that [former FBI Director James] Comey is the very antithesis of the ethical leader he described,” George Washington University law professor Jonathan Turley writes. “Comey was found to have violated both federal law and regulations for his own gain, and he made critical decisions that put personal over institutional interests.”
---
|
---
| [Trump Establishes Space Command, Defends US Interest in Space](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d1a3886496&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“President Trump formally announced the re-establishment of the U.S. Space Command on Thursday after a 17-year absence as his administration focuses on concerns about the vulnerability of U.S. satellites,” Louis Casaino writes. “The Senate confirmed Air Force four-star Gen. John ‘Jay’ Raymond to lead U.S. Space Command this past June.”
---
|
---
| [Not Even 24 Hours Later, MSNBC’s Lawrence O’Donnell Apologizes for Supposed Russia ‘Scoop’](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1636b60d78&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“I asked Wednesday morning how long it would be before the [MSNBC’s Lawrence O’Donnell] retracted or, at the very least, corrected his bogus Russia ‘scoop’ . . . As it turns out, the answer to that question was about 18 hours,” Becket Adams writes. After NBC received a legal demand for retraction, O’Donnell admitted an “error in judgment” in promoting a false story about President Trump’s finances.
---
|
---
| [Americans’ View of the Current Economy is the Highest in 19 Years](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=be642c94e0&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Bloomberg_
With a majority of Americans approving of President Trump’s economic record, the left is trying to rewrite the story of a blue-collar and middle-class resurgence in the United States. Fortunately, the results keep proving them wrong. “Hiring and income gains are keeping consumers upbeat,” Reade Pickert reports. “The level of confidence could allow for sustained household spending that remains a mainstay of the economy.”
---
|
---
| [Ivanka Trump to Visit Argentina in September](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=709560dbc5&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Buenos Aires Times_
“Ivanka Trump will travel to Argentina in September to focus on issues that make it difficult for women in developing countries to prosper financially, including lack of access to credit and limits on employment,” the _Buenos Aires Times_ reports. Ms. Trump “plans to also visit Paraguay to promote the Women's Global Development and Prosperity Initiative, a program started six months ago” by Ms. Trump and the White House.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7ca7e5838d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=14bf9b8e53&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=3429938d21)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: EdMarkey.com
subject: urgent plea
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Hello,

We have some great news and some not-so-great news.

**Great news first:** Elizabeth Warren along with 116 Massachusetts State Senators and Representatives -- 72% of the state legislature -- are backing Ed Markey's re-election campaign! Ed is proud to have the support of his colleagues who are dedicated to fighting for Massachusetts families.

**And now the not-so-great news:** We're facing a crucial end-of-month deadline at midnight, and we were certain that we would see a surge in grassroots support, but right now we're still short of our goal.

_**[That's why we need to make an urgent plea: Will you pitch in $27 or more to have Ed's back and keep him fighting for us in the Senate? ](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-083119_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

President Trump and the RNC are raising mountains of right-wing cash. **They raised more than DOUBLE what Democrats raised last month!**

That money will make its way into Senate races like Ed's to fund relentless attacks.

That's why we're boosting our fundraising into overdrive this week and asking for your direct help.

_**[Will you pitch in $27 to support Ed and help us reach our $20,000 goal before midnight?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-083119_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

| Patriot,
Recent polling shows that things are not looking great for President Trump and his supporters like me going into 2020. Take a look:

Take a look: | == | ==, 08.27.2019 Even though we know that these polls are often biased against President Trump and Republicans, 2020 is going to be a tough battle. Knowing that the media, DC elites, and Democrats will do everything in their power to make sure our President doesn't win reelection - I need to know that you're with me. From tax cuts to defending the border to making America Great Again, our President is doing so much. Will you support me as I support the President going into the 2020 election? | | | == | If we stand together, we will show the media and the liberal elites that the forgotten men and women of this country are still here. Despite all the name-calling and denigration from celebrities and news outlets like CNN and the New York Times, we're proud to be patriotic and proud to vote for President Trump in 2020. Can you show your support by donating today? | | | == | | | == | God Bless America, | | Matt Gaetz | | | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2019 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. name: Dick Durbin
subject: There couldn't be more at stake in 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
**[The end-of-month deadline is here. Pitch in $5 now to help me meet my goal.](http://action.dickdurbin.?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eom-august-2019?refcode=em190831am&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Peter,
Make no mistake: the Republicans will fight tooth and nail to hold on to their Senate majority in 2020. If we're going to defeat Mitch McConnell and the GOP, we've got to start fighting now.
Not only do we need to elect new Democrats to win a majority, we need to defend every single Democratic Senate seat, starting right here in Illinois. That's why I'm asking for your support.
**[We only have until midnight to reach our end-of-month fundraising goal. Can you step up and contribute $5 right now to help us take back the Senate from the Republicans?](http://action.dickdurbin.?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eom-august-2019?refcode=em190831am&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
We can't afford to miss critical fundraising milestones like this one, Peter. This campaign is too important, and there couldn't be more at stake for our country in 2020.
I'm asking--will you show your support for a Democratic Senate with a contribution now?
**[I need you on the team so we can win this. Contribute $5 to my campaign right now.](http://action.dickdurbin.?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eom-august-2019?refcode=em190831am&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://action.dickdurbin.?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eom-august-2019?refcode=em190831am&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

subject: $200,000? We can do better than that
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
There's no sitting back in this race, because the Republicans aren't. Jason Lewis went on Rush Limbaugh this week and attacked Tina. She needs us now.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-aug2019?refcode=em190831EOM4-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend,

There's no sitting back in this race, because the Republicans aren't.

Jason Lewis is already on a press blitz, including attacking Tina on Rush Limbaugh. We know the kind of reach that show has -- and we can't underestimate how it will help Lewis.

And on top of that, Lewis has already met his $200,000 campaign launch goal.

This race is heating up. And we need to be ready for anything. **We're on track to outpace Lewis if we raise $25,000 by midnight tonight. But we can only do it with your support.**

**[We can't fall behind now. Will you pitch in now to help make sure we hit our goal?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-aug2019?refcode=em190831EOM4-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4e99f/c1f7015/67c14f3d/1146278f/2319248490/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLWVtYWlsLWF1ZzIwMTkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImVtMTkwODMxRU9NNC1mdWxsIn0=/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-aug2019?refcode=em190831EOM4-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

subject: RE: There’s so much more at stake

body:
Friend,

Did you see Sri's email about our momentum?

Here's the quick version: Now that Sri's scared off the Republican incumbent (our opponent from last cycle), we know we can flip this district blue.

Yup, this race is a total TOSS UP!

But we need your help to flip this critical seat. If we're going to win we need every single supporter (that means YOU!) to step up and help us grow this momentum. **[Will you chip in $22 now to flip TX-22 blue?>> ](https://act.myngp.com/el/cBzmlHSGiAoskiJ_NsUwLZQgkl-YrSvqqXUf_gawlYk=/HK4_lQC7jofg4Ntd_4cJsTyjxBjzrxIv6_CEKnAZIvU=?refcode=20190831email_nondonors)**

---

Thanks for your ongoing support!
Team Sri

\---------- Previous message ---------
From: Sri Preston Kulkarni <sri.kulkarni@sri2020.com>
Date: Fri, Aug 30, 2019 at 11:52 AM
Subject: There's so much more at stake
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/cBzmlHSGiAoskiJ_NsUwLZQgkl-YrSvqqXUf_gawlYk=/HK4_lQC7jofg4Ntd_4cJsTyjxBjzrxIv6_CEKnAZIvU=?refcode=20190831email_nondonors)

Friend,
With wall-to-wall coverage of the Presidential campaigns, our nation is diving headfirst into the 2020 elections. But we must remember there's so much more at stake: **2020 also means a chance to flip key House seats from red-to-blue -- and ours is one of them!**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/cBzmlHSGiAoskiJ_NsUwLZQgkl-YrSvqqXUf_gawlYk=/HK4_lQC7jofg4Ntd_4cJsTyjxBjzrxIv6_CEKnAZIvU=?refcode=20190831email_nondonors)

The Cook Political Report just moved our race from Lean Republican to a complete toss up. [**This campaign is just heating up, but we need your support to keep this incredible momentum going. Will you chip in $22 now to flip TX-22 blue? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/cBzmlHSGiAoskiJ_NsUwLZQgkl-YrSvqqXUf_gawlYk=/HK4_lQC7jofg4Ntd_4cJsTyjxBjzrxIv6_CEKnAZIvU=?refcode=20190831email_nondonors)

**[DONATE $22 NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/cBzmlHSGiAoskiJ_NsUwLZQgkl-YrSvqqXUf_gawlYk=/HK4_lQC7jofg4Ntd_4cJsTyjxBjzrxIv6_CEKnAZIvU=?refcode=20190831email_nondonors)**
---

When I first ran against the Republican incumbent in 2018, many didn't think we had a fighting chance. We ended up coming within 14,000 votes of flipping the district, less than 5%. This time, we're ready to win that fight.
[**Together, we 've stood against the odds and together we'll keep growing this momentum. Donate now to help power us past the finish line! >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/cBzmlHSGiAoskiJ_NsUwLZQgkl-YrSvqqXUf_gawlYk=/HK4_lQC7jofg4Ntd_4cJsTyjxBjzrxIv6_CEKnAZIvU=?refcode=20190831email_nondonors)

**[DONATE NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/cBzmlHSGiAoskiJ_NsUwLZQgkl-YrSvqqXUf_gawlYk=/HK4_lQC7jofg4Ntd_4cJsTyjxBjzrxIv6_CEKnAZIvU=?refcode=20190831email_nondonors)**

In gratitude,
Sri Preston Kulkarni

| The good news is that once people learn about me and my platform, they are excited. Think about it -- at one point you didn’t know who I was either -- and now you’re a part of the Yang Gang! Pretty incredible stuff.

My message is this -- we must put humanity first. Whether that’s my plan for a Freedom Dividend, $1,000 a month for every American adult with no strings attached, my aggressive but realistic climate plan, or my plan to restore trust in our democracy.

**A lot of these campaigns have raised more money than ours (and they’re definitely outspending us), but they don’t have the capacity for growth like our campaign does.** Their ceiling for growth is kind of baked in. No one knows what our ceiling is. But we’re going to find out together.

Our message is catching fire as the American people are getting more and more excited about our campaign. Though the media might try to deny it, we are a top campaign by any objective measure -- polling, fundraising, grassroots network. In fact, in some polls we’re pulling ahead of candidates like Cory Booker, Beto O’Rourke, and Pete Buttigieg in early primary states.

[Please consider donating to this campaign before tonight’s deadline. Any amount you give will help us win over more Americans and bring the bold change this country needs.](http://trk.klclick.com/wf/click?upn=-2BIAqDMuImSGKgCGE2sotQ02lV0-2B-2FAsZCh9lzrV5waF336SCiCpNhiC1bHSNpM7K2o-2BsMMqjzCtiB-2F-2BhqlGSYQonz8-2FV3OUnWyoI8ibugGv-2FjH1BXkx5qV4wxR-2BvqSiQnmYBvyN-2BEbz0DfYf8gGO-2BwtS-2FRZ6ema50Stp3tlmp5axqD1HAAIQLyRqugWJ14WMrB9Fd0TApZ8sU2flwAYTpPyVNIkSi1-2FRVWi7vHphyg-2Fz6y1Mvtq1Yhd3nRR7Lei8Ek7ovzje5d1Z7y3sD2fhExFpoF-2BZP8PqBuI4i0ahzH9I-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFbLQSoKhQqtPS-2FGMblNyE-2FlLDRcMOovmjnCEhSIP3Li9aSGyGFMAX6KWQQKQTX40AGj0P4lCbIDxkRjKco2wi-2FPNXn-2BCGAlC8SntvcggcB1pux4eHWWjk251ZrSj1Zhd9GZ6a5EE-2BeVpHz9JG1bN1R2Q-2FQaXbn5OY8V2FndCqHI2CdOFVutBIRlKwBXNzOM7jv2ODAOSrnaMddc2E1mKyCC6xRA4HEnzy3ti0Y3YiJbNKgPRL582DONhghLbBRHT0di-2FZOKosfrUw-2FvIOXzgWTknt1fsLZTAbvGxbElFfSd5ulE6Sn-2BuYgdIuLucJ-2B0V-2FpHCijkox6DgDxqaQ7FT-2FXwHnmSj1Mx0FPxru5t5Jklw-3D-3D)

clean_body: Please give what you can so we can hit our August fundraising goal before midnight and share our message with as many voters as possible | | | | | We wanted to make sure you saw Andrew’s email from this morning. So far today over 2,149 people have already pitched in so that we can meet our midnight deadline. We only have 12 hours left to raise $94,383. | Friend -- | I wouldn’t ask you if we didn’t really need it. The importance of this fundraising is pretty simple. I need to introduce myself to more and more Americans because the truth is most Americans don’t know who I am. And the issues we’re fighting for here are too important to be ignored. Please give what you can so we can hit our August fundraising goal before midnight and share our message with as many voters as possible: | | The good news is that once people learn about me and my platform, they are excited. Think about it -- at one point you didn’t know who I was either -- and now you’re a part of the Yang Gang! Pretty incredible stuff. My message is this -- we must put humanity first. Whether that’s my plan for a Freedom Dividend, $1,000 a month for every American adult with no strings attached, my aggressive but realistic climate plan, or my plan to restore trust in our democracy. A lot of these campaigns have raised more money than ours (and they’re definitely outspending us), but they don’t have the capacity for growth like our campaign does. Their ceiling for growth is kind of baked in. No one knows what our ceiling is. But we’re going to find out together. Our message is catching fire as the American people are getting more and more excited about our campaign. Though the media might try to deny it, we are a top campaign by any objective measure -- polling, fundraising, grassroots network. In fact, in some polls we’re pulling ahead of candidates like Cory Booker, Beto O’Rourke, and Pete Buttigieg in early primary states. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | | \- Andrew | | Can you make a donation today? Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people. | | **Join the Yang Gang! If you want to get more involved and help fuel this movement, please . | | | Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality. | | | | | | | All rights reserved. New York, NY #HumanityFirst | No longer want to receive these emails? . Friends of Andrew Yang

body:
---
| | Our right-wing extremist president is trying to single-handedly destroy one of our key rights as Americans. Trump is all for "respecting the Constitution" when he's fighting back against common sense gun safety legislation -- but now, he wants to repeal a tenet of our democracy with an executive order.- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Our right-wing extremist president is trying to single-handedly destroy one of our key rights as Americans: [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06e6/72412298/40000462/610294d1/2431649069/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_190831_Protect14th_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190831_Protect14th_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190831_Protect14th_U1_X1") Trump is all for "respecting the Constitution" when he's fighting back against common sense gun safety legislation -- but now, he wants to repeal a tenet of our democracy with an executive order. [**We need to fight back IMMEDIATELY -- can you add your E-Signature to our emergency petition to protect the 14th Amendment? >>**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06e6/72412298/40000462/610294d0/2431649069/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_190831_Protect14th_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+We+need+to+fight+back+IMMEDIATELY++can+y&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190831_Protect14th_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190831_Protect14th_U1_X1") | | | [SIGN ON >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06e6/72412298/40000462/610294d3/2431649069/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_190831_Protect14th_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+SIGN+ON+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190831_Protect14th_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190831_Protect14th_U1_X1")

Peter -- it's clear that Trump wants to repeal birthright citizenship because he's a racist. He wants to be able to decide on a case by case basis who's "American enough" to be a citizen --
Which means that, if he gets his way, millions of people of color born in the U.S. will have to jump through hoops to prove that they "deserve" to be here.
[**This is disgusting AND unconstitutional -- add your name to STOP TRUMP from ending birthright citizenship >>**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06e6/72412298/40000462/610294d2/2431649069/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_190831_Protect14th_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+This+is+disgusting+AND+unconstitutional+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190831_Protect14th_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190831_Protect14th_U1_X1")

"" | | "" It's clear that Trump is a white nationalist, but we CAN fight back against his racist, authoritarian policies. \-- Voter Protection Project | "" | | Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. If you'd like to support the Voter Protection Project, you can "" We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can "" If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, ""
