name: BREAKING (via Team Baer)
subject: Mitch McConnell just blocked:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
We can't let Mitch McConnell get away with sabotaging the integrity of our elections for his personal political gain.
|
---

| | **BREAKING: McConnell rewards his voting machine lobbyist donors by BLOCKING election security bills** Mitch McConnell took donations from voting machine lobbyists -- then just paid them back by BLOCKING Democrats' election security bills!

Quickly -- We can't let Mitch McConnell get away with sabotaging the integrity of our elections for his personal political gain.

Can you rush in $19 before tonight's End of Month Deadline to defeat McConnell and elect more Democrats to the Senate? | [**DONATE >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827c3/232dfd1/810b69d/62a1cb13/2508405986/VEsH/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190831_em_fr_b2_brking_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

**FIRST:** Mitch McConnell took donations from big corporate voting machine lobbyists.

**THEN:** To protect his donors' interests, McConnell blocked election security bills that would improve and safeguard our voting system and our democracy.

**NOW:** We need a massive response before the midnight deadline to take him on.

[**DONATE >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827c3/232dfd1/810b69d/62a1cb13/2508405986/VEsE/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190831_em_fr_b2_brking_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

McConnell knows Republicans can't win when the rules are fair -- so he's willing to cheat.

We can't let McConnell get away with sabotaging the integrity of our elections for his own political gain.

We need to pass election security legislation, but we can't do that while Mitch McConnell blocks every single bill House Democrats pass.

Can you pitch in before midnight to flip Nate Silver's must-win Colorado, flip the entire Senate, and get rid of McConnell?
[**DONATE >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827c3/232dfd1/810b69d/62a1cb13/2508405986/VEsF/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190831_em_fr_b2_brking_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---
Thanks,
Team Baer

---
[](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827c3/232dfd1/810b69d/62a1cb10/2508405986/VEsC/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://www.facebook.com/DanForColorado/") [](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827c3/232dfd1/810b69d/62a1cb11/2508405986/VEsD/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://twitter.com/danbbaer")

Colorado is the most important Senate race in the entire country according to Nate Silver and CNN. It's our only chance of flipping the Senate. And to win the most important Senate race, we need the most qualified candidate.

Dan served as an Ambassador under President Obama and as the head of the Colorado Department of Higher Education in Governor Hickenlooper's cabinet. If elected, he would be the first openly gay man to serve in Senate history.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but it's because we're running a grassroots campaign and rejecting corporate PAC money. We need your help to win -- and grassroots donations like yours truly make the difference. | | [**DONATE**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827c3/232dfd1/810b69d/62a1cb16/2508405986/VEsA/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=footer&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")

body:

name: The Markey Campaign
subject: ↪️re: urgent plea
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Hello: Did you see the great news (below)?

Ed is humbled to have the support of so many friends and colleagues. But right now we're all a bit nervous about reaching our crucial end-of-month fundraising goal. So we had to bump this message back up and ask: _**[will you rush $27 or more to support Ed and help us reach our goal before midnight?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-083119_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Begin Forward:
* * *
Hello,

We have some great news and some not-so-great news.

**Great news first:** Elizabeth Warren along with 116 Massachusetts State Senators and Representatives -- 72% of the state legislature -- are backing Ed Markey's re-election campaign! Ed is proud to have the support of his colleagues who are dedicated to fighting for Massachusetts families.

**And now the not-so-great news:** We're facing a crucial end-of-month deadline at midnight, and we were certain that we would see a surge in grassroots support, but right now we're still short of our goal.

_**[That's why we need to make an urgent plea: Will you pitch in $27 or more to have Ed's back and keep him fighting for us in the Senate? ](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-083119_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

President Trump and the RNC are raising mountains of right-wing cash. **They raised more than DOUBLE what Democrats raised last month!**

That money will make its way into Senate races like Ed's to fund relentless attacks.

That's why we're boosting our fundraising into overdrive this week and asking for your direct help.

_**[Will you pitch in $27 to support Ed and help us reach our $20,000 goal before midnight?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-083119_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: _

clean_body: | | | Hello: Did you see the great news (below)? Ed is humbled to have the support of so many friends and colleagues. But right now we're all a bit nervous about reaching our crucial end-of-month fundraising goal. So we had to bump this message back up and ask: "=" Begin Forward: Hello, We have some great news and some not-so-great news. Great news first: Elizabeth Warren along with 116 Massachusetts State Senators and Representatives -- 72% of the state legislature -- are backing Ed Markey's re-election campaign! Ed is proud to have the support of his colleagues who are dedicated to fighting for Massachusetts families. And now the not-so-great news: We're facing a crucial end-of-month deadline at midnight, and we were certain that we would see a surge in grassroots support, but right now we're still short of our goal. "=" President Trump and the RNC are raising mountains of right-wing cash. They raised more than DOUBLE what Democrats raised last month! That money will make its way into Senate races like Ed's to fund relentless attacks. That's why we're boosting our fundraising into overdrive this week and asking for your direct help. name: Stephanie Garvey via Francis Conole
subject: Withstanding attacks from Republican super PACs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
| | | It's Stephanie here - Francis' Finance Director. I wanted to reach out before we close the books on August.

We have a budget gap of $1,800 that we need to close before midnight. This couldn't be more important -- everything we raise for our Fight Back Fund will make sure we have the resources to withstand ongoing attacks from GOP super PACs.

**Make a donation right now and help us close the gap:[https://go.conoleforcongress.com/superpac-attack](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-superpac?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+httpsgoconoleforcongresscomsuperpacattac&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190831_2_6&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190831_2_6&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190831_2_6")**

Thank you for helping!

-- Stephanie

|
---|---|---

|
---

_This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Francis Conole is running to represent New York 's 24th Congressional District to bring fresh leadership to Central NY. A fourth-generation Syracusan and Iraq War veteran, he has dedicated his life to service and sacrifice. body:
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802df5/4bef7a87/68eba4dc/287f1e29/3569772662/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

In just a few hours, we close the books on August fundraising. We haven't hit our goal yet, and I need your help.
[**I see you haven 't made a donation yet, so I'm hoping you can step up before midnight tonight. Any amount makes a big difference.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802df5/4bef7a87/68eba4dc/287f1e28/3569772662/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA4MzEtMi1mdWxsIn0=/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-august-eom?refcode=em190831-2-full")

So please, chip in before midnight. Sara and I are counting on you.
All my best,
Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager

subject: Almost there
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020
body:
I really appreciate your support for this campaign. We can't do it without you.

Hey -- I know you've already heard about our goal of getting another 1,000 contributions before the end of the month to jumpstart our momentum heading into the fall.
Good news: we're mere hours away from the deadline now, and the team just called to tell me we only have 84 more contributions to go.
**[If you've been waiting to add your contribution toward this deadline push, can you make it now? Bill

name: Addisu Demissie, Cory 2020
subject: We're short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, I'm sorry to be emailing you on a Saturday -- I know you're probably getting a lot of emails right now. And I know you can't chip in every time we ask, so I want you to know when your donation can make the biggest impact. This is one of those moments. [**Right now we 're $17,492 short of our goal and we can't risk falling behind. Will you chip in before our midnight deadline to help us reach $450,000 by the end of the month?**](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-august?refcode=em_fr_20190831_ASD_20190831-fr-ASD-eomupdate-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Cory's been spending a lot of time preparing for the September debate. This will be the first time the frontrunners of the race debate the issues on stage together, and another chance for Cory's message to reach a wider audience. Here's the truth: **when people find out about Cory Booker, the more they like him.** That's why I have to ask:**[Will you help us hit our end-of-month deadline tonight so we have the resources available to amplify Cory's message on the debate stage?](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-august?refcode=em_fr_20190831_ASD_20190831-fr-ASD-eomupdate-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ _[](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-august?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20190831_ASD_20190831-fr-ASD-eomupdate-actives_actives_express5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20,50,100")

[](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-august?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_20190831_ASD_20190831-fr-ASD-eomupdate-actives_actives_express10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20,50,100")

[](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-august?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_fr_20190831_ASD_20190831-fr-ASD-eomupdate-actives_actives_express20&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20,50,100")

[](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-august?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_fr_20190831_ASD_20190831-fr-ASD-eomupdate-actives_actives_express50&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20,50,100")

[](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-august?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_fr_20190831_ASD_20190831-fr-ASD-eomupdate-actives_actives_express100&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20,50,100")

[](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-august?refcode=em_fr_20190831_ASD_20190831-fr-ASD-eomupdate-actives_actives_expressother&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20,50,100")_ There will only be ten candidates on stage at the next debate. The field is narrowing, and that means that all eyes will be on our underdog campaign to see if we can keep up with the frontrunners. It also means we don't have the luxury to fall short of our fundraising goals. How much we raise this month will determine how many organizers we can hire to build up our team in key early states, how many ads we can put up online to reach undecided voters, and how many events we can host so people all across the country can meet Cory. [**So please, make a donation before tonight 's end-of-month deadline.**](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-august?refcode=em_fr_20190831_ASD_20190831-fr-ASD-eomupdate-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") We're a small but mighty campaign, and it's because of your support that we're going to elect Cory Booker to be the next president. Let's go,
Addisu Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-august?refcode=em_fr_20190831_ASD_20190831-fr-ASD-eomupdate-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b5e/5fca0d19/72a3a78b/2919b7c2/214899052/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b5e/5fca0d19/72a3a78b/2919b7c1/214899052/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b5e/5fca0d19/72a3a78b/2919b7c0/214899052/VEsHAQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b5e/5fca0d19/72a3a78b/2919b7cf/214899052/VEsHAA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b5e/5fca0d19/72a3a78b/2919b7c3/214899052/VEsHAw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Team Scholten
subject: HEADLINE – Steve King is Broke and Has Been Abandoned by His Colleagues...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kingontheropes [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kingontheropes]
Peter,

I’m going to share something with you that a lot of Iowans already know: Steve King is on the ropes.

Just this week, the Daily Beast reported:

“As he gears up for a difficult re-election cycle, Rep. Steve King’s campaign is strapped for cash. Individual donations to the Iowa Republican have continued to flow but support from corporate donors and King’s own colleagues have vanished entirely.”

In a normal year, Steve King usually wins by 23%. Last year, our campaign closed that gap to just 3%. That's right, we got within striking distance - this time we have some unfinished business. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kingontheropes]

As we close the books on the first month of our campaign and begin to take our message to voters across Iowa’s 4th Congressional District, we hope you’ll join us by chipping in whatever you can to close the gap for good and finally replace Steve King. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kingontheropes]

If you stand with J.D., can you donate today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kingontheropes]

Thanks for being with us,
Team Scholten

name: Election Update (via 314 Action)
subject: These Democratic scientists are at risk [they need our help!]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, [www
body:
|
---
[ ](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb471c/4bd7760e/402e6130/77e1bb17/1897299555/VEsH/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_headerlogo?refcode=314_headerlogo&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3")

| | Republicans have ALREADY launched attack ads against our Democratic scientists -- And these attacks will only ramp up the closer we get to the election! - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - National Republican groups singled out defeating eight of our Democratic incumbent scientists in Congress as one of their highest priorities in 2020 -- **and they're going after them BECAUSE they are scientists who won in historically Republican districts.** Republicans have ALREADY launched attack ads against our Democratic scientists -- And these attacks will only ramp up the closer we get to the election! Our Democratic House Majority is the ONLY defense we have against Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell's reckless agenda to dismantle our health care, obstruct action on climate change, and outright REJECT science. [**We need 100 Founding Donors to rush in a donation of $10, $27 or more to our Incumbent Defense Fund to help them fight back! All donations will be MATCHED >>**](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_incumbentdefense?refcode=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&amount=27&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+We+need+100+Founding+Donors+to+rush+in+a&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3") [](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_incumbentdefense?refcode=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&amount=27&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3") | | | [Donate (x2)](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_incumbentdefense?refcode=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&amount=27&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+Donate+x2&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3")
---
**It might seem early in the cycle, but our incumbents need your help:**
[](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_incumbentdefense?refcode=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&amount=27&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3")**Lauren Underwood (IL-14):** Lauren is the youngest black woman ever elected to office. She's a former nurse and senior healthcare official who flipped an R+5 district blue -- But right now, she's facing SEVEN Republican challengers (and counting).

[](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_incumbentdefense?refcode=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&amount=27&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3")**Joe Cunningham (SC-1):** Joe was the first Democrat to flip this R+10 district in nearly half a century. That's why Republicans named defeating this ocean engineer a top priority of theirs, they know his margin of victory in 2018 was just 1.4%.

[](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_incumbentdefense?refcode=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&amount=27&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=7&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3")**TJ Cox (CA-21):** TJ was elected in one of the closest elections in all of 2018 -- winning by just 862 votes. This engineer needs our help to win again, he's completely rejected any and all corporate PAC money.

[](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_incumbentdefense?refcode=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&amount=27&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=8&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3")**Elaine Luria (VA-2):** Elaine is a former engineer and veteran of the U.S. Navy. She flipped Virginia's 2nd Congressional District blue by just two points after her GOP opponent resorted to election fraud to try and defeat her.

[](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_incumbentdefense?refcode=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&amount=27&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=9&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3")**Sean Casten (IL-6):** Sean is a respected leader on climate change and spent his career creating good-paying jobs in the renewable energy industry. He's the first Democrat to flip this seat in 46 years and is being challenged by a former Republican Lt. Governor.

[](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_incumbentdefense?refcode=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&amount=27&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=10&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3")**Dr. Kim Schrier (WA-8):** Dr. Kim Schrier is the only woman doctor in the entire U.S. Congress. She completely rejected corporate PAC money and is the first Democrat EVER elected to represent Washington's 8th Congressional District.

[](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_incumbentdefense?refcode=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&amount=27&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=11&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3")**Chrissy Houlahan (PA-6):** Chrissy is a former industrial engineer and high school science teacher who won a red to blue race, ending the all-male Pennsylvania Congressional delegation. Karl Rove singled her out on national television and directed Republicans to target her specifically if they want to retake the House.

[](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_incumbentdefense?refcode=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&amount=27&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=12&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3")**Jeff Van Drew (NJ-2):** Jeff is a former dentist who flipped a solidly conservative district that Trump carried for the first time in nearly 25 years. National Republican groups have singled him out as part of their plan to retake the House.

[**Be one of the 100 Founding Donors we need to step up and help re-elect these eight red to blue Democratic incumbents! Make a matched donation now >>**](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_incumbentdefense?refcode=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&amount=27&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=13+-+Be+one+of+the+100+Founding+Donors+we+nee&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3")
| | [Protect these scientists!](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_incumbentdefense?refcode=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&amount=27&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=14+-+Protect+these+scientists&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3")
---
Thank you,
314 Action

| [www.314actionfund.org](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb471c/4bd7760e/402e6130/77e1bb19/1897299555/VEsHAA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "http://www.314action.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=15+-+www314actionfundorg&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3")
---
| | Paid for by 314 Action Fund, [www.314actionfund.org](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb471c/4bd7760e/402e6130/77e1bb18/1897299555/VEsHAw/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://www.314actionfund.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=16+-+www314actionfundorg&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3"), not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---
314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb471c/4bd7760e/402e6130/77e1bb67/1897299555/VEsHAg/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footer?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=17+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb471c/4bd7760e/402e6130/77e1bb66/1897299555/VEsHDQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=18+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3")
If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb471c/4bd7760e/402e6130/77e1bb65/1897299555/VEsHDA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=19+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190831_IncumbentUpdate_U2_X3")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben_Ray_Luj=C3=A1n?=
subject: I'm speechless
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
I can't believe what I'm seeing.
---
| | I can't believe what I'm seeing.

Only this morning, I told you I was dangerously short of not meeting my end-of-month goal.

**_But my team just told me we 're about to have one of the biggest fundraising comebacks of our entire campaign!_**

[**_I only need 1 more gift from 18326 before midnight to meet my goal, WIN my race, and DEFEAT McConnell 's Republican Senate. Will you be the gift that puts me over the top? >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4c2/18e32a7f/52b12c34/7bea786b/2932047449/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190831_em_fr_b3_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")

**And in moments like these, I 'm reminded just how powerful your support is. **

I'm so grateful for you and the historic comeback you're about to make happen for my critical Senate race. body:

#

name: Dan Baer
subject: humbly asking:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
Everything we worked for under attack the moment he took the Oath of Office
|
---

| | [**In a minute, I 'm going to ask you for $5 before tonight's End of Month Deadline. It's the most important of my entire campaign. >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827c2/232dfd1/8127f42/62a1cb1a/663744529/VEsH/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190831_em_fr_b3_baer_all&amount=20&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")

But first, let me explain why.

I was born and raised in Colorado.

I went on to work at the State Department, where I helped Secretary Clinton write her landmark speech declaring LGBTQ rights are human rights.

I was appointed a US Ambassador by President Obama, where I represented the United States in over fifty countries around the world.

I stood up to China and Russia, defended human rights, and championed American values like fairness and equality.
_
Then I watched Donald Trump's Inauguration -- and saw everything we worked for under attack the moment he took the Oath of Office.
_
**[We need leaders who will fight back against Donald Trump. That's why I'm running to flip this Colorado Senate seat blue, and why I'm humbly asking for you to pitch in ](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827c2/232dfd1/8127f42/62a1cb1a/663744529/VEsE/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190831_em_fr_b3_baer_all&amount=20&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")****[$5](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827c2/232dfd1/8127f42/62a1cb1a/663744529/VEsF/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190831_em_fr_b3_baer_all&amount=20&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on") **[**before tonight 's critical End of Month Deadline. >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827c2/232dfd1/8127f42/62a1cb1a/663744529/VEsC/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190831_em_fr_b3_baer_all&amount=20&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
Nate Silver, CNN, MSNBC, and Fox News (!) all agree: Colorado is our only chance at taking back the Senate for Democrats in 2020.

We need to win here to stop Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and Cory Gardner from obstructing all of our progress.

I know this first-hand.

I saw my home state of Colorado bar protections for LGBTQ individuals when I was a teenager, and I remember thinking I'd never feel happy or safe.

Now I'm happily married to my husband Brian, and I've served our country with him at my side.

My experience makes me optimistic about the possibility for progress.

We can't throw away this shot to restore dignity to our politics and our nation and make history.

I'm proud that if elected, I will be the first openly gay man to serve in the Senate in American history.

To win this race we'll have to take on Republicans and special interests who will do anything to tear our campaign down.

That's why I need your help before tonight's deadline.

**[If you share my vision, and are ready to flip Colorado and the whole Senate for Democrats, I hope I can earn your ](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827c2/232dfd1/8127f42/62a1cb1a/663744529/VEsD/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190831_em_fr_b3_baer_all&amount=20&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**[**$5**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827c2/232dfd1/8127f42/62a1cb1a/663744529/VEsA/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190831_em_fr_b3_baer_all&amount=20&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**[ ](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827c2/232dfd1/8127f42/62a1cb1a/663744529/VEsB/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190831_em_fr_b3_baer_all&amount=20&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**[**before the biggest deadline of my entire campaign hits at midnight. >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827c2/232dfd1/8127f42/62a1cb1a/663744529/VEsO/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190831_em_fr_b3_baer_all&amount=20&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on") [ ](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827c2/232dfd1/8127f42/62a1cb1a/663744529/VEsP/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190831_em_fr_b3_baer_all&amount=20&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
Thank you,

Dan
|

[](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827c2/232dfd1/8127f42/62a1cb1b/663744529/VEsHBQ/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://www.facebook.com/DanForColorado/") [](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827c2/232dfd1/8127f42/62a1cb18/663744529/VEsHBA/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://twitter.com/danbbaer")

Colorado is the most important Senate race in the entire country according to Nate Silver and CNN. It's our only chance of flipping the Senate. And to win the most important Senate race, we need the most qualified candidate.

Dan served as an Ambassador under President Obama and as the head of the Colorado Department of Higher Education in Governor Hickenlooper's cabinet. If elected, he would be the first openly gay man to serve in Senate history.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but it's because we're running a grassroots campaign and rejecting corporate PAC money. name: Ed Markey
subject: (no subject)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
Hello,

We have some great news and some not-so-great news.

Great news first: Elizabeth Warren along with 116 Massachusetts State Senators and Representatives -- 72% of the state legislature -- are backing Ed Markey's re-election campaign! Ed is proud to have the support of his colleagues who are dedicated to fighting for Massachusetts families.

And now the not-so-great news: We're facing a crucial end-of-month deadline at midnight, and we were certain that we would see a surge in grassroots support, but right now we're still short of our goal.

That's why we need to make an urgent plea: Will you pitch in $27 or more to have Ed's back and keep him fighting for us in the Senate?

President Trump and the RNC are raising mountains of right-wing cash. They raised more than DOUBLE what Democrats raised last month!

That money will make its way into Senate races like Ed's to fund relentless attacks.

That's why we're boosting our fundraising into overdrive this week and asking for your direct help.

Will you pitch in $27 to support Ed and help us reach our $20,000 goal before midnight?
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-2020-victory?refcode=EM-071719_1&amp;amount=27&amp;recurring=true&amp;email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amp;firstname=&amp;lastname=&amp;city=Cresco&amp;state=PA&amp;zip=18326&amp;phone=&amp;occupation=&amp;employer=

Paid for by The Markey Committee

Contributions or gifts to The Markey Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

Click here to unsubscribe: http://action.edmarkey.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"

name: Tina Smith
subject: If I could just say...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Every month, every rapid response, every deadline is a benchmark for us to stay ahead of my opponent in this race.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-aug2019?refcode=em190831EOM5-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, I cannot tell you how important this is.

Every month, every rapid response, every deadline is a benchmark for us to stay ahead of my opponent in this race. Because every grassroots donation shows that we're unafraid of anything the Republicans throw at us.

But I've got to be honest with you. Lewis announced that he's met his $200,000 goal, which means the pressure is on. With just a few hours left before our end-of-month deadline, we haven't reached our goal yet.

This is our first real head-to-head deadline against Jason Lewis, so it really counts. We still have a ways to go before midnight. Will you help meet our goal?

**[Before midnight, rush $10 or whatever you can to help me meet our critical $25,000 goal.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-aug2019?refcode=em190831EOM5-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thank you for everything,

Tina Smith | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. clean_body: Help us hit our goal by midnight tonight. | | | | | Friend -- | In just 2 hours we close our books on our August fundraising goal. And if we don’t hit it, then we’re going to have to cut back. Help us hit our goal by midnight tonight: If we don’t raise $36,000 in the next four hours, we can’t hire more organizers on the ground in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina -- the early primary states that decide who will become the Democratic nominee for President. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for everything you do! Team Yang | | Can you make a donation today? Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can.
